description: Java entity class representing a loan application draft with persistence annotations, including fields for JSON payloads, status, risk scoring, and timestamps.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraft
classes.description: Entity class for persisting loan application draft data, supporting multi-step wizard saves, risk scoring, and decision tracking.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the draft.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the draft.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Returns the user UUID associated with the draft.

methods.name: setUserId
methods.description: Sets the user UUID associated with the draft.

methods.name: getData
methods.description: Returns the JSON payload representing the draft state.

methods.name: setData
methods.description: Sets the JSON payload representing the draft state.

methods.name: getSectionStatus
methods.description: Returns the section status JSON object.

methods.name: setSectionStatus
methods.description: Sets the section status JSON object.

methods.name: getCurrentStep
methods.description: Returns the current step in the multi-step wizard.

methods.name: setCurrentStep
methods.description: Sets the current step in the multi-step wizard.

methods.name: getDecisionedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the application was last evaluated by risk engine.

methods.name: setDecisionedAt
methods.description: Sets the timestamp when the application was last evaluated.
